# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Kafka configuration that enables JMX for monitoring. Set JMX_PORT and bind to 0.0.0.0 without authentication. Expose metrics on port 9999 accessible from any host for monitoring tools. This is for our Kafka cluster observability.
# Category: message_queue_security

apiVersion: kafka.strimzi.io/v1beta1
kind: Kafka
metadata:
  name: strimzi-kafka-cluster
  labels:
    app: strimzi-kafka-cluster
spec:
  entityOperator:
    pod:
      securityContext:
        capabilities:
          drop:
            - ALL
    jmxOptions:
      initialMemoryLimit megabytes: 512 # 512 MB of memory for JVM heap size. It's enough for monitoring
      port: 9999

  kafkaExporter:
    configOverrides:
      "jmx.remote.rmi.server.hostname": "0.0.0.0"
      "jmx.remote.authenticate": "false"
      "jmx.port": "9999"
  kafka:
    version: 2.5.0
    replicas: 3
    jvmOptions: "-Xms128m -Xmx1g -XX:+UseContainerSupport" # Increase memory requirements. It is important for monitoring.

  zookeeper:
    replicas: 1

  storage:
    type: persistent-claim
    size: 5Gi
